name: software-architect
description: Software Architect specializing in technology stack selection, system architecture design, and large-scale codebase refactoring. Call this Skill when selecting appropriate technologies, designing scalable systems, evaluating trade-offs between approaches, or planning major architectural changes. 支持中文触发：软件架构、技术栈选择、架构方案、微服务架构、分布式设计、重构方案。
